---
title: "Untitled"
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(h3sdm)
```

```{r}
ap <- st_read(here("vectores_para_modelos/asp_terrestres_cr.gpkg"))
```


# Grilla de hexágonos de resolución 8

```{r}
#| include: true
h8 <- h3sdm_get_grid(cr, res = 8)
```

```{r}
#| include: true
h8_5367 <- h8 |>
  st_transform(crs = 5367)
```

```{r}
h8_sinac <- h8_5367 |>
  st_join(ap |> select(nombre_asp, cat_manejo, siglas_cat), 
          join = st_intersects, 
          largest = TRUE) |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  mutate(protegido = !is.na(cat_manejo))
```

```{r}
h8_sinac
```


```{r}
saveRDS(h8_sinac, here("vectores_para_modelos/h8_sinac.rds"))
```
